tour.title: Project Overview & Setup
tour.description: Start with the project documentation. README.md covers the prerequisite compilers, setup steps, and environment variables needed to get MLIR-RL running, while the configuration docs explain how to configure loop nest scheduling runs.

tour.title: Training Entry Point
tour.description: The main training script initializes the environment, collects trajectories from loop scheduler runs, and updates the neural networks using Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO).

tour.title: RL Scheduling Environment
tour.description: The Gym-style reinforcement learning environment wraps the MLIR loop nests, tracking current state features, valid transformations, and calculating optimization speedup rewards.

tour.title: Loop Transformations
tour.description: Applies loop transformations like tiling, loop interchange, parallelization, and vectorization to the MLIR loop nests. It invokes Python bindings or CLI fallbacks dynamically.

tour.title: Neural Network Models
tour.description: Defines the actor-critic policy model and loop nest representation networks, encoding loop nest features into sequence embeddings via LSTM or self-attention layers.

tour.title: Timing Execution & Safety
tour.description: Measures benchmark execution times inside a process-isolated sandbox to isolate MLIR JIT compiler crashes and prevent training corruption.
tour.languageLesson: Using multiprocessing and OS signal handlers (such as SIGABRT) protects the training process from JIT compiler crashes or illegal memory access during code compilation.

tour.title: Slurm HPC Scripting
tour.description: Orchestrates cluster execution by setting up Conda environments, exporting variables, and launching training or evaluation runs in batch queues.
tour.languageLesson: Shell scripts handle background environment setups dynamically. Caching dependencies and libraries in cluster paths prevents duplicate builds across multiple jobs.
